name: Directorate General of Trade Remedies (India)
description: Independent investigative authority for anti-dumping, countervailing duty, and safeguard investigations in India. Vulnerable to industry capture through lobbying.
objectives: Conduct impartial investigations per WTO Anti-Dumping Agreement standards
Protect domestic industry from unfair trade practices and injury
Maintain India's credibility in international trade remedy system
Complete investigations within statutory 12-18 month timeline
constraints: WTO procedural requirements mandate transparency and due process
Statutory timelines limit investigation depth and scope
Budget constraints limit technical economic analysis capacity
Political pressure from Ministry of Commerce on high-profile cases
